response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years across fullstack, embedded, and infrastructure domains — significantly overqualified for a Junior/Mid-Level role. While his TypeScript, React, AWS, and Kubernetes skills align technically with the job requirements, placing a Staff-level engineer in an entry-level IC role creates an immediate retention risk and salary expectation mismatch. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks suggests a career trajectory moving toward senior architecture work, not toward junior fullstack contribution. The absence of explicit PostgreSQL or NestJS experience is a minor secondary concern.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across multiple production environments (Optilyz, re:cinq) directly matching the required stack
AWS (CDK) and Kubernetes experience covers all listed nice-to-have infrastructure qualifications
Demonstrated LLM/AI-agent integration work at re:cinq aligns with nice-to-have AI/ML exposure
concerns: Massively overqualified at Staff/Senior level with 15+ years — high risk of disengagement, rapid attrition, or misaligned compensation expectations
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; primary database exposure is MongoDB and MySQL, with SQL listed only as a skill keyword
NestJS not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being a key framework preference for this role
